disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Annular plaques with a raised scaly advancing edge and central clearing, expanding; heavy outdoor soil play
trigger_question_examples: Do the circles have a raised scaly outer edge with a clearer centre, expanding outward?
Does your child play a lot in soil/grass?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, raised scaly edges with clearer centres, growing outward, and he plays a lot in soil and grass.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No hot/hard spreading swelling, honey crusting or fever — the bleeding is only from scratching (secondary-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any hot/hard swelling, golden crusts, or fever, or is the bleeding just from scratching?
Is the skin around it spreading and hot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No hot swelling or golden crusts and no fever — the bleeding is just from scratching.
